Meta.Architecture: Singleton-based Managers transitioning to Event-Driven (Event Broker).

Dependencies.Package: New Input System for player controls.

CoreScenes.Scene: Main menu and lobby for turret selection.

Module.name: GameManager
Module.Responsibility: Singleton managing global state (HP, Score, GameState).

Module.name: GameHUD
Module.Responsibility: UI controller for real-time gameplay feedback via UI Toolkit.

Module.name: EnemySpawner
Module.Responsibility: Wave-based enemy generation logic using Object Pooling.

StrictConventions.Rule: Focus exclusively on Wave Mode development.
Strictly avoid GameObject.Find(); use inspector refs or singletons.
Prefer Unity UI Toolkit for new UI screens.
Use K&R style braces for all C# scripts.
